translation.literal_translation: And because of presence in the luminous body. (32)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.3.32: Jaimini's line appeals to jyotis-reference (e.g., solar orb) to deny deva-adhikara in those meditations.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra shorthand for the jyotis-based objection.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S03 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit adhikara and varna terminology choices in records 1.3.086-1.3.088.
